title: Blending systems and methods with blade assembly dampening
abstract: Blender and food processing devices are described that dampen impact forces between a blending blade and a blending jar. An example blender includes a blender base and a blending jar that has a seal opening. A blending blade assembly in the jar includes a blending blade, a jar shaft attached to the blending blade and extending through the seal opening, a circular motion guide positioned around the jar shaft, and a jar seal positioned between the circular motion guide and the seal opening. The jar seal prevents contact between the circular motion guide and the seal opening and dampens forces induced by relative motion between the seal opening and the blending blade, jar shaft, and/or circular motion guide. A motor in the blender base drives the jar shaft to rotate the blending blade in the blending jar. The dampening may reduce wear or damage to the jar and may improve quality of the blending jar and blade assembly.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A blender configured to dampen impact forces between a blending blade and a blending j ar, the blender comprising: a blender base; a blending jar mounted to the blender base, the blending jar having a seal opening; a blending blade assembly, comprising: a blending blade configured to rotate in the blending jar, a jar shaft attached to the blending blade and extending through the seal opening, a circular motion guide positioned around the jar shaft, a jar seal positioned between the circular motion guide and the seal opening, the jar seal preventing contact between the circular motion guide and the seal opening and dampening forces induced by relative motion between the seal opening and the blending blade, jar shaft, and/or circular motion guide; a motor in the blender base, the motor being configured to drive the jar shaft to rotate the blending blade in the blending jar. 2. The blender of claim 1 , wherein the seal opening is positioned at a bottom end of the blending j ar. 3. The blender of claim 1 , wherein the jar seal comprises a plurality of protrusions extending from a surface on the jar seal. 4. The blender of claim 1, further comprising a circular motion guide housing positioned between the circular motion guide and the jar seal. 5. The blender of claim 4, wherein the circular motion guide housing comprises an annular groove, the jar seal being positioned in the annular groove. 6. The blender of claim 1, wherein the blending blade, jar shaft, and circular motion guide are rigid relative to each other. 7. The blender of claim 1, wherein the blending jar has an inner surface at the seal opening and an outer surface at the seal opening, and the jar seal extends into contact with the inner surface and the outer surface. 8. The blender of claim 1, wherein the blending jar has an upward surface at the seal opening and a downward surface at the seal opening, and the jar seal extends into contact with the upward surface and the downward surface. 9. The blender of claim 1, wherein the jar seal is annular. 10. The blender of claim 9, wherein the jar seal comprises a contact surface contacting the seal opening, the contact surface comprising a groove. 1 1. The blender of claim 1, wherein the jar seal comprises a first jar seal and a second jar seal, the first jar seal being spaced from the second jar seal. 12. The blender of claim 1 , wherein the jar seal comprises a plurality of protrusions extending from a surface on the jar seal contacting the seal opening. 13. The blender of claim 1, wherein the blending jar comprises an annular groove around the seal opening, the jar seal being seated in the annular groove. 14. The blender of claim 13, wherein the blending jar comprises an upper annular groove and a lower annular groove, the jar seal being seated in the upper and lower annular grooves. 15. The blender of claim 1, wherein the blending jar comprises a post, the seal opening extending through the post. 16. The blender of claim 15, wherein the post comprises a top surface and a bottom surface, the jar seal covering the top and bottom surfaces of the post. 17. A peripherally-dampened blending blade assembly, comprising: a drive shaft; a blending blade attached to an end of the drive shaft and configured to rotate with the drive shaft; a circular motion guide positioned around the drive shaft; a flexible seal positioned around the circular motion guide, the flexible seal comprising a dampening material and being configured to contact a blending jar. 18. The blending blade assembly of claim 17, further comprising a housing positioned between the circular motion guide and the flexible seal. 19. The blending blade assembly of claim 18, further comprising a circular motion guide seal positioned between the jar shaft and the housing, the circular motion guide seal sealing the circular motion guide. 20. The blending blade assembly of claim 17, further comprising a housing positioned external to the flexible seal. 21. A method of dampening impact forces between a blending blade assembly and a blending jar, the method comprising: providing a blending jar, the blending jar having a bottom opening; positioning a blade assembly in the bottom opening, the blade assembly comprising a blade positioned within the blending jar, a jar shaft extending through the bottom opening and attached to the blade, and a circular motion guide positioned around the jar shaft; dampening relative movement between the blade assembly as a whole and the blending jar. 22. The method of claim 20, wherein a dampening member positioned between the blending jar and the blade assembly dampens the relative movement between the blade assembly as a whole and the blending jar. 23. The method of claim 20, further comprising sealing the bottom opening. 24. The method of claim 20, wherein the relative movement is induced by the blade impacting media held in the blending jar.
